objective: Add targeted ambient exports for @anthropic-ai/mcpb so DXT manifest and MCPB config code can typecheck without broad any masking.

Declared McpbManifestSchema.safeParse with the success/error shape consumed by validateManifest.
Declared getMcpConfigForManifest with the option object used by mcpbHandler.

verification.notes: @anthropic-ai/mcpb no longer appears in the tsc log.
